evidence_samples: I have visited to take my second dose and Process was really smooth.
Shanti tooks good care and provide all details before vaccination.
That person was slightly clueless and offered only one package.
The staff nurses are down to earth.
The place can get quite crowded so if you wish to get done with all formalities within 1.5-2 hours, it is better to reach there before 830am when the billing counter opens.
Please display few boards in the entrance of the hospital and also in the emergency department
Had a really bad experience during discharge.
I called them to book an appointment, i requested for a senior doctor and seeked their years of experience, they don't want to share it, transparency is not there.
when i called Appolo they give all the detail's,experience and i feel comfortable while choosing Doctor.
They need to be sensitive and more transparent towards the patient and his/her family.
Fortis,pls have transperency and it is right of a patient.
Say hello with folded hands.and Take the patient sitting in the wheel chair ...
Good and clean hospital.
But once i got to the hospital, I found a better and more economical one and decided to go ahead
Good and clean hospital.
The medical facilities are all great with good in-patient post operative care by doctors, nurses.
The medical facilities are all great with good in-patient post operative care by doctors, nurses.
We felt like staying in our own home.
Recently underwent a surgery for my left shoulder, the doctors are extremely good, but the management needs to be more patient oriented than money minded.
The patient has been taken good care overall right from the consultation until the discharge, everything is seamless and hassle free.
Overall, it was a good experience throughout.
I went for my father.
I was having menopause related issues and went to see a gynecologist.
We went with the insurance and the processing time was quick.
There is great team of doctors and good OT facility.
The housekeeping staff is also good but they can respond to calls from the room a little faster.
There is great team of doctors and good OT facility.
My primary concern arose from the insistence on conducting multiple tests, which appeared unrelated to my condition, before initiating any treatment.
I really liked the service there!
I really liked the service there!
